import pytest
from source import levenshtein

def test_levenshtein_first_char_equal_should_not_increment_distance():
    source = "abc"
    target = "abd"
    expected_distance = 1  # only the last character differs
    actual_distance = levenshtein(source, target)
    assert actual_distance == expected_distance, (
        f"Expected levenshtein('{source}', '{target}') to be {expected_distance} "
        f"but got {actual_distance}"
    )
